summary: Published dunning-ladder skill to runx registry, opened PR against runxhq/runx, harness passed with 2 cases (sealed + failure), sealed receipt generated.
observations: Publish method: runx registry publish --profile skills/dunning-ladder/X.yaml skills/dunning-ladder --registry https://api.runx.ai
Case 1: within-cap-reminder — sealed. Input: invoice_status=overdue, aging_days=15, cap=3. Output: reminder_proposal with channel=email.
Case 2: not-overdue — failure. Input: invoice_status=paid, aging_days=0. Correctly refused with Record is not overdue.
github.repo_starred_by: umbtest03 has starred runxhq/runx (verified via GitHub API)
Published skill resolves via registry read

dogfood.command: runx skill codeboost-tr/dunning-ladder@sha-6b9208a2ce6f --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i invoice_status=overdue -i aging_days=15 --input-json cadence_policy=...
dogfood.verify_verdict: sealed (receipt generated by governed runtime for dogfood run)
